channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish, 2nd May
item.description:
Rubbish left in front of the door before collection day

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Common Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped food, 2nd May
item.description:
Meat has been dumped again down the alley behind 14-19 old school close again. Housing association has written to all houses on street not sure whether someone is throwing it over the wall.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old School Close, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builders rubbish left against the wall by bins, 2nd May
item.description:
Not something the dustmen will usually pick up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 62-82, Bird in Bush Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 2nd May
item.description:
Lots of wood and cardboard on the road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brooke Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown hedge dangerous blocking view of pedestrians, 2nd May
item.description:
The hedge has grown so far over the pavement that it is impossible to see pedestrians from my driveway. I asked the neighbour to trim hedge back to boundary it was only trimmed a little . I nearly hit a pedestrian and the postman it’s very dangerous. Can this hedge please be trimmed fully back to the boundary as a matter of urgency as it is causing me and my son who is a learner driver a lot of stress and affecting our mental health.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crosier Close, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bins blocking the pavement, 2nd May
item.description:
Outside number 12 there are full garbage bins causing overspill to litter the road and the pavement opposite. They are also causing restricted access to pushchairs and wheelchairs, making vulnerable people more vulnerable by having to use the road instead of the blocked pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Allens Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Items left in the communal area, 2nd May
item.description:
Someone dropped these items

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 62-82, Bird in Bush Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside no13, 2nd May
item.description:
Tree is invested and leaning
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Kylemore Road, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegally parked cars, 2nd May
item.description:
Cars have been parking on the double yellow lines for the past two years. NSL pay lip service to enforcement unless it’s in the centre of Enfield town. Despite calling continually and informing them of the situation I have yet to see a single enforcement officer.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lancaster Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Domestic rubbish dump, 2nd May
item.description:
Again there is rubbish dumped outside this property. It happens every few months now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Park, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Graffiti in the playground

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mead Way, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping Elliott Road between 31 and 33, 2nd May
item.description:
Sofa base or mattress has been dumped
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pellis Yard, Widmore, Greater London

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Horsell Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
